mechanism_narrative: When FEDFUNDS is elevated relative to recent months, equity valuations face a higher discount rate and tighter liquidity conditions, so the 10-year Treasury yield should fall over the next 20 trading days as growth-sensitive risk appetite weakens and safe-haven demand for duration rises.
failure_condition: If FEDFUNDS is above 4% and SPX does not fall or yields do not decline over the next 20 trading days in repeated triggered episodes, with forward 20-day yield moves not negative more than 55% of the time, reject the signal.

mechanism_narrative: A rise in UNRATE above its recent level signals deteriorating labor demand and weaker household income growth, which should push long-duration Treasury yields down over the next 20 trading days as markets price slower real activity and easier policy.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises by at least 0.2 percentage points versus the prior month
failure_condition: Reject if month-over-month UNRATE increases above 0.2 pp are followed by positive 20-day yield changes in more than 60% of cases or if the average 20-day yield change is nonnegative.

mechanism_narrative: When RSAFS and PAYEMS both weaken at the same time, the consumption and payroll-income channel is contracting, so the 10-year Treasury yield should decline over the next 20 trading days because investors anticipate lower nominal spending and weaker inflation pressure.
failure_condition: Reject if joint declines in RSAFS and PAYEMS do not correspond to negative 20-day yield moves more than 55% of the time, or if either series alone explains the signal better than the joint specification.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp decline in INDPRO after prior strength indicates industrial output contraction and rising recession risk, which should reduce the 10-year Treasury yield over the next 5 trading days as markets rapidly price weaker real activity and a flight to duration.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO falls by at least 0.5% month over month
failure_condition: If INDPRO monthly declines of 0.5% or more are not followed by negative 5-day yield changes more than 60% of the time, or the median yield response is positive, reject the hypothesis.

mechanism_narrative: When HOUST and GDPC1 both weaken, the housing-led demand channel and broad real activity are deteriorating together, so Treasury yields should fall over the next 60 trading days as inflation and growth expectations are revised lower.
failure_condition: Reject if simultaneous weakness in HOUST and GDPC1 is followed by rising 60-day yields in at least 55% of observations or if the signal loses explanatory power once either proxy is removed.

mechanism_narrative: A rising FEDFUNDS rate in the presence of elevated CPIAUCSL implies active policy restraint against inflation, which should lift the 10-year Treasury yield over the next 20 trading days as investors anticipate tighter nominal conditions and a higher term structure path.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS is at least 4.0% and CPIAUCSL is rising on a 3-month annualized basis
failure_condition: Reject if the combination of high FEDFUNDS and rising CPIAUCSL does not precede positive 20-day yield changes in more than 55% of cases, or if yields fall despite the joint tightening-inflation setup.

mechanism_narrative: In a labor-market deterioration regime, a rising UNRATE with falling PAYEMS signals broad employment slack and weaker wage pressure, which should pull the 10-year Treasury yield down over the next 5 trading days as markets price lower growth and inflation.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises and PAYEMS declines in the same monthly release window
failure_condition: Reject if joint labor weakening episodes are not followed by negative 5-day yield moves more than 60% of the time or if the average response is indistinguishable from zero.

mechanism_narrative: In a post-crisis contraction, falling RSAFS alongside weak HOUST indicates collapsing consumer spending and housing demand, so the 10-year Treasury yield should decline over the next 60 trading days as recession pricing dominates any inflation concern.
failure_condition: Reject if paired declines in retail sales and housing starts fail to produce negative 60-day yield changes in at least 55% of cases, or if the signal is weaker than a single-proxy model using RSAFS alone.
